assets.title: Main Menu Button Frame
assets.summary: Reusable binary-state main-menu button family. Icons and labels are attached at assembly time.

source.note: Temporary sheet still includes baked icons. Final promoted frame art should have empty icon and text slots.

notes: This is the reusable button-family contract, not one menu row.
Final frame art should remove baked icons from the state frames.
Labels, icons, and actions must stay live/attached at assembly time.

assets.title: Sword Icon
assets.summary: Main-menu button icon candidate for skirmish or combat actions.

source.note: Temporary crop from the current button sheet. Final icon art should be exported as a standalone transparent asset.

notes: This icon should be composited onto the main-menu button frame.
The current crop is a placeholder because the source sheet still bakes icons into button frames.
